Welcome To Our Campus

Welcome to Maharashtra Institute Of Medical Sciences and Research

The MAEER’s MIT World Peace Society, Pune, India and all its allied branches including the MIMSR Medical College at Latur is the fulfilment of the dreams of Prof. Dr. V. D. Karad, who is a visionary educationalist and also a pioneer in struggle for world peace and human rights.

The Maharashtra Academy of Engineering Education and Research MAEER Pune was established in 1983, to harness the knowledge of science and technology for the welfare of the society and has founded more than 70 institutions in various fields of science and education. The aims of MAEER are to provide the finest environment for teaching, learning, research, innovation and character building.

READ MORE

Prof. Dr. Vishwanath D. Karad
Founder, Executive President and Managing Trustee Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research, Pune

ALUMNI

Shri. Ramesh K. Karad

Executive Director

MAEER’s, MIMSR Medical College, Latur – 413512

EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR’S MESSAGE

Management is committed to promote education to unserved and down trodden population. Management has firm belief in the ethos and culture of India which always worships the knowledge. MIMSR Medical College caters with the health needs of the rural masses through more tham 775 bedded Yashwantrao Chavan Rural Hospital and health extension activities.

Experienced faculty in various specialties give practical / clinical / and basic teaching to reach the objectives of value based training in fundamentals of medical Education to prepare medical graduates with necessary competence to shoulder the responsibility of best health care services to the community at large.

We are pleased to offer a complimentary tutorial that clarifies how to calculate nrr in cricket. This guide is expertly crafted to simplify the process of calculating net run rates, making it accessible to cricket enthusiasts of all levels.

Beyond this, keep abreast of every moment of action with our updated live cricket score. From the exciting thrills of T20 matches to the captivating strategy of Test cricket, our live scores provide a seamless connection to the heartbeat of the game, no matter your location.

For a comprehensive perspective of the cricketing landscape, we also offer the ICC rankings for 2023. These rankings offer a clear snapshot of each team’s performance and standing in the international cricket scene, contributing to a broader understanding of the sport.

READ MORE

EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR’S MESSAGE

Welcome to MIMSR Medical College, Latur.

MIMSR Medical College & Hospital is run by MAEER Trust Pune-prestigious institute & body of international repute. Currently MIMSR is running MBBS course with an intake capacity of 100 students & postgraduate Degree Courses (MD/MS) in 15 specialties and PhD in three specialties.

MIMSR has state of the art infrastructure with well equipped 775 bedded hospital named as “YCRH” Yashwantrao Chavan Rural Hospital. It has all the basic and sophisticated facilities to cater the needy patients from backward areas of Marathwada region, with just, affordable charges. YCRH is having well equipped ICU, ICCU, SICU, NICU, PICU, Operation Theatres, Blood Bank and investigative backup in Radiology, Pathology, Microbiology and Biochemistry.

READ MORE

Dr. Hanumant T. Karad

Executive Director

MAEER’s, Maharashtra Institute of Dental Sciences & Research Dental College, Latur – 413512

Events

02

Oct

2020

6th World Parliament of Science, Religion & Philosophy

Greetings from 6th World Parliament of Science, Religion and Philosophy & MIT World Peace University, Pune, India! We extend our humble invitation to you to grace the historic 6th World Parliament of Science, Religion and Philosophy organized by MIT World Peace University, Pune, India, on the occasion of Birth Anniversary of Rashtrapita Mahatma Gandhi Ji. Attached herewith : Invitation Card, Speakers list, Proposed M2M  Zoom Link for Registration :  Registration Links for 6th World Parliament of Science, Religion & Philosophy DAY 1 – 6th World Parliament of Science, Religion & Philosophy You are invited…

  • 09:30 - (October 4, 2020)
  • MIT World Peace University, Pune, India

About Us

The MAEER’s MIT World Peace Society, Pune, India and all its allied branches including the MIMSR Medical College at Latur is the fulfilment of the dreams of Prof. Dr. V. D. Karad, who is a visionary educationalist and also a pioneer in struggle for world peace and human rights.
